---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with the application
title: '[BUG] Brief description of the issue'
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 **Bug Description**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 **Steps to Reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ **Expected Behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ **Actual Behavior** 
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📱 **Environment**
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 91, Firefox 89]
- **Device**: [e.g., Desktop, iPhone 12, Samsung Galaxy]
- **Screen Size**: [e.g., 1920x1080, Mobile]
- **Operating System**: [e.g., Windows 10, macOS Big Sur, iOS 14]

## 📷 **Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🔍 **Additional Context**
- Console errors (if any)
- Network errors (if any)
- Any other context about the problem

## 🎯 **Priority**
- [ ] Low (cosmetic, minor inconvenience)
- [ ] Medium (affects functionality but has workaround)
- [ ] High (major functionality broken)
- [ ] Critical (application unusable, security issue)

## 🏷️ **Component**
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Post Creation
- [ ] Scheduling
- [ ] Analytics
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Mobile UI
- [ ] Other: ___________
